Cross-Petition For (A) Order Confirming, And Recovering Trust Assets, (B) Order Setting Penalty Phase Dertermination Of Double Damages Award, (C) Respnser To Ng Petition To Vacate Order Of Finaldistribution And To Quiet Title.
Off Calendar Feb-13-2014 Advanced From Apr-01-14 To Mar-03-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Vacate Order Of Final Distribution And To Clear Title On Grounds Of Extrinsic Fraud, Recording Outside Chain Of Title, Estoppel By Deed, Written Agreement And Estoppel
Off Calendar Mar-27-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Padway for and with Rosalind Ng (Petitioner). Andrew Cantor for Stella Oahyin (Successor Trustee). Michael Oahyon in Pro Per.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with the petition and Cross-Petition. Mr. Padway objected to Michael Oahyon offering additional evidence that has not been filed. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Capozzoli. Not Reported.

Cross-Petition For (A) Order Confirming, And Recovering Trust Assets, (B) Order Setting Penalty Phase Dertermination Of Double Damages Award, (C) Respnser To Ng Petition To Vacate Order Of Finaldistribution And To Quiet Title.

Petition For Order Removing Trustee And Appointing Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-05-2013 Continued To Dec-03-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Authorize Resignation As Trustee
Off Calendar Feb-15-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch Guardian Ad Litem for Minor Contingent Beneficiaries. Raymond Levy in Propria Persona.

Ms. Rasch stated that there is a plan in place to re-aquire the property that was lost in foreclosure and have it moved back into Trust by the end of March. In addition, Ms. Rasch expressed concerns about having Maurice Oahyan as Sole Trustee. The Court granted the petition To Authorize Resignation of Raymond Levy as Trustee without release of liabilty at this point (subject to Ms. Rasch preparing the order and review of said order). Maurice Oahyon will remain as Sole Trustee.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition To Authorize Resignation As Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-24-2011 Continued To Jan-09-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch Guardian Ad Litem for Contingent Minor Beneficiary. Raymond Levy Trustee in Propria Persona.

The Petition to Authorize Resignation as Trustee was continued to January 9, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Levy to file any appropriate documents, to allow Parties to respond and for status of the property.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Whitehead.

Petition To Authorize Resignation As Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-01-2011 Continued To Oct-24-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Raymond Levy in Propria Persona.

Mr. Levy presented oral argument to support his request for resignation as Trustee. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.
